caption: A person's hands hold a sports trading card encased in a clear plastic protector. The card features a baseball player in a white uniform against a green background and bears a signature and the name "JOHNSON." The scene is set in a room with a desk, where another man wearing a dark navy blue t-shirt is visible in the background. On-screen text prominently displays "JASPYS" and "CASEBREAKS.COM" in red and white. Throughout the sequence, the hands move the protected card, shifting its angle to catch the light. In the final frame, the card is tilted further, creating a reflective glare on its surface. The background remains consistent, showing the man sitting at a desk with various equipment and a logo for "JASPYS Sports Cards & More" visible on a monitor or screen behind him.
